title: ProvisionRequest
description: Request from an AI agent to provision a service resource from a provider

offering_id.description: Service offering ID from the provider's manifest (e.g., 'supabase/postgres')

tier_id.description: Selected tier ID within the offering

project_name.description: Human-readable project name for the provisioned resource

region.description: Desired deployment region — hard constraint (must be one of the offering's available regions)

preferred_region.description: Soft region preference. Provider SHOULD honor when possible but MAY select the nearest available region. Ignored if 'region' is also specified.

payment_method.description: Payment method to use for this provisioning request

payment_proof.description: Payment proof (token, transaction hash, escrow ID, etc.) — format depends on payment_method

agent_public_key.description: Ed25519 public key (base64url) for encrypting credentials returned to the agent

nonce.description: Unique cryptographic nonce for replay protection (base64url encoded)

config.description: Offering-specific configuration (e.g., database version, instance size, extensions)

webhook_url.description: URL for async provisioning callbacks when resource is ready

delegating_agent_id.description: A2A: ID of the agent delegating this provisioning request (v1.1)

delegation_proof.description: A2A: Ed25519 signature by the delegating agent authorizing this request (v1.1)

nhi_token_mode.description: NHI: preferred credential mode — static API key, short-lived token, or federated identity (v1.1)

budget.description: FinOps: budget constraint for this provisioning request (v1.1)

ttl_seconds.description: Ephemeral environment TTL in seconds, null for persistent (v1.1)

trace_context.description: OpenTelemetry W3C traceparent header value for distributed tracing (v1.1)

max_monthly_cost.description: Maximum monthly cost in provider's currency

max_total_cost.description: Maximum total cost for TTL-based environments

alert_threshold_percent.description: Alert when budget consumption reaches this percentage
